title: phyla nodiflora var. pusilla
intro: Phyla nodiflora var. pusilla, also known as the dwarf fog-fruit or Texas frog's eye, is a perennial herb native to eastern Asia and North America. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyla nodiflora var. pusilla include its ability to treat respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Phyla nodiflora var. pusilla are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
